title: tirucalia stenoclada
intro: Tirucalia stenoclada, also known as Indian walnut, is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tirucalia stenoclada include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent cancer. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments to extract its active compounds and utilize its therapeutic benefits.
